Currently, the EFSPI methods leaders are working on five priority topics. These are aligned with overall EFSPI priorities.

::: {#fig-posSens .cell-output-display}

|Covariate adjustment                                            |Active    |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                       |                           |
|A framework to appraise statistical methods building on ICH M15 |Completed |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                       |                           |
